claims.text: Chemical reaction networks without hidden layers can solve tasks for which spiking neural networks require hidden layers.
claims.source_quote: We mathematically prove that chemical reaction networks without hidden layers can solve tasks for which spiking neural networks require hidden layers.

claims.text: The proof uses the deterministic mass-action kinetics formulation of chemical reaction networks.
claims.source_quote: Our proof uses the deterministic mass-action kinetics formulation of chemical reaction networks.

claims.text: A certain reaction network without hidden layers can learn a classification task previously proved to be achievable by a spiking neural network with hidden layers.
claims.source_quote: Specifically, we prove that a certain reaction network without hidden layers can learn a classification task previously proved to be achievable by a spiking neural network with hidden layers.

claims.text: Analytical regret bounds for the global behavior of the network are provided.
claims.source_quote: We provide analytical regret bounds for the global behavior of the network

claims.text: The asymptotic behavior of the network is analyzed.
The Vapnik-Chervonenkis dimension of the network is analyzed.
The proposed chemical reaction network can learn to classify handwritten digits in pixel images.
claims.source_quote: we confirm the learning capacity of the proposed chemical reaction network for classifying handwritten digits in pixel images

claims.text: The chemical reaction network solves the handwritten digit classification task more accurately than a spiking neural network with hidden layers.
claims.source_quote: we show that it solves the task more accurately and efficiently than a spiking neural network with hidden layers

claims.text: The chemical reaction network solves the handwritten digit classification task more efficiently than a spiking neural network with hidden layers.
claims.source_quote: we show that it solves the task more accurately and efficiently than a spiking neural network with hidden layers
